# Fedoriaka-Quantum-Constant-Adder

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install Fedoriaka_Quantum_Constant_Adder in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure Fedoriaka_Quantum_Constant_Adder package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to Fedoriaka_Quantum_Constant_Adder
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/ShreyanshBanerjee/Fedoriaka-Quantum-Constant-Adder):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/ShreyanshBanerjee/Fedoriaka-Quantum-Constant-Adder.git
```

or from
[conda](https://anaconda.org/ShreyanshBanerjee/Fedoriaka-Quantum-Constant-Adder)

``` sh
$ conda install -c ShreyanshBanerjee Fedoriaka_Quantum_Constant_Adder
```

or from
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/Fedoriaka-Quantum-Constant-Adder/)

``` sh
$ pip install Fedoriaka_Quantum_Constant_Adder
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/ShreyanshBanerjee/Fedoriaka-Quantum-Constant-Adder)’s
[pages](https://ShreyanshBanerjee.github.io/Fedoriaka-Quantum-Constant-Adder/).
Additionally you can find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/ShreyanshBanerjee/Fedoriaka-Quantum-Constant-Adder)
and [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/Fedoriaka-Quantum-Constant-Adder/)
respectively.
